## New Research

### Swiss Re sigma: $107bn Nat Cat Losses in 2025
- 2025 global nat cat insured losses: $107bn
- Secondary perils (wildfires, SCS, floods) drove record 92% of losses
- 2026 projection: $148bn baseline; extreme scenario $320bn
- Source: https://www.swissre.com/institute/research/sigma-research/ | Jan 2026

### Aon: SCS Now #1 Insurance Peril of 21st Century
- SCS surpassed tropical cyclones as costliest natural disaster risk
- US SCS losses in 2025: $61bn (third-highest on record)
- 30 individual billion-dollar SCS events globally

### ISSB IFRS S2 Amendments
- Scope 3 Category 15 financed emissions: banks/insurers only
- CO₂e conversion mandatory; location-specific emission factors prioritized
- Effective Jan 1, 2027
